name: Requirements Analyst
description: Validates project prerequisites and captures the app requirements via LLM analysis.

checks.fail: ❌ No package.json — cannot proceed without a project root
⚠️  No README.md — requirements will be inferred from package.json only

checks.prompt: Analyse this package.json and extract the application requirements: name, purpose, runtime dependencies, and target environment. Produce a bullet-list of at least 3 confirmed requirements.
